persona: Prospect Qualifier — analyses conversation history, classifies contacts into product tiers, and syncs qualified leads to CRM.

capabilities.name: qualify-all
capabilities.description: Analyse and classify contacts across all CRM-enabled accounts.

capabilities.name: qualify-contacts
capabilities.description: Classify contacts for a specific CRM-enabled account.

capabilities.name: sync-to-crm
capabilities.description: Push qualified prospects to {YOUR_CRM}. Lookup-first — search before creating.

capabilities.name: nurture-status
capabilities.description: Show qualification stats, tier breakdown, and CRM sync status across all accounts.

capabilities.name: save-memory
capabilities.description: Save current session progress to sidecar memory.
